stories.title: Components/Actions/Button
stories.shortDescription: The primary action trigger.
stories.docsDescription: A labelled button with Box tones and sizes. Emits a `click` event; set `disabled` to make it inert.

referenceRows.name: click
referenceRows.description: Fired when the button is activated.

stories.title: Components/Actions/Button Group
stories.shortDescription: A grouped set of related action buttons.
stories.docsDescription: Pass button definitions as JSON `options`; `value` marks the active option when used as a toggle group.

stories.title: Components/Actions/Icon Button
stories.shortDescription: An icon-only action with an accessible label.
stories.docsDescription: A compact action rendering a single glyph; the required `label` provides the accessible name.

stories.title: Components/Actions/Link Button
stories.shortDescription: A button-styled link for navigation actions.
stories.docsDescription: Renders an anchor with Box button tones. Requires a safe `href`; the accessible name comes from `label`.

stories.title: Components/Actions/Menu
stories.shortDescription: An action menu driven by a JSON item list.
stories.docsDescription: Provide menu entries as JSON `items` (`id`/`label`, optional `disabled`).

stories.title: Components/Actions/Menu Item
stories.shortDescription: A single menu row for composed menus.
stories.docsDescription: Use inside custom menu compositions when you are not driving `box-menu` from JSON `items`.

stories.title: Components/Actions/Segmented Control
stories.shortDescription: A compact mutually exclusive choice control.
stories.docsDescription: Provide segment definitions as JSON `options` and the selected `value`.

stories.title: Components/Feedback/Badge
stories.shortDescription: A compact status label.
stories.docsDescription: A small inline label for status or categorization, in the Box feedback tones.

stories.title: Components/Feedback/Chip
stories.shortDescription: A compact, optionally removable tag.
stories.docsDescription: A small token for a selected value or filter. Emits `remove` with its `value` when dismissed.

referenceRows.name: remove
referenceRows.description: Fired with `{ value }` when the chip is dismissed.

stories.title: Components/Feedback/Alert
stories.shortDescription: An inline message banner.
stories.docsDescription: A titled banner conveying status with a tone, and an optional message body.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-alert heading="Upload complete" message="24 files were added." tone="success"></box-alert>

variants.name: Info
variants.html: <box-alert heading="Heads up" message="Shared links expire in 30 days." tone="info"></box-alert>

variants.name: Success
variants.html: <box-alert heading="Upload complete" message="24 files were added to Marketing." tone="success"></box-alert>

variants.name: Warning
variants.html: <box-alert heading="Storage almost full" message="You've used 92% of your quota." tone="warning"></box-alert>

variants.name: Error
variants.html: <box-alert heading="Upload failed" message="3 files could not be added." tone="error"></box-alert>

stories.title: Components/Feedback/Empty State
stories.shortDescription: A heading + message for empty result surfaces.
stories.docsDescription: Use when a list or panel has nothing to show. Prefer `heading` + `message`; optional `action-label` for a recovery CTA.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-empty-state heading="No results" message="Try a different search."></box-empty-state>

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-empty-state heading="No results" message="Try a different search or clear the filters."></box-empty-state>

variants.name: With action
variants.html: <box-empty-state heading="Folder empty" message="Upload a file to get started." action-label="Upload"></box-empty-state>

stories.title: Components/Feedback/Error Mask
stories.shortDescription: A full-section error recovery surface.
stories.docsDescription: Use when a region failed to load. Provide `heading`, `message`, and optional `action-label`.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-error-mask heading="Couldn't load files" message="Something went wrong." action-label="Retry"></box-error-mask>

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-error-mask heading="Couldn't load files" message="Something went wrong while loading this folder." action-label="Retry"></box-error-mask>

stories.title: Components/Feedback/Help Text
stories.shortDescription: Inline supporting guidance for a field or section.
stories.docsDescription: Passive help copy with optional `tone`. Pair near the control it explains; keep messages short.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-help-text label="Shared links" message="Shared links expire after 30 days."></box-help-text>

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-help-text label="Shared links" message="Shared links expire after 30 days."></box-help-text>

variants.name: Warning
variants.html: <box-help-text label="Permissions" message="Editors can reshare this folder." tone="warning"></box-help-text>

stories.title: Components/Feedback/Nudge
stories.shortDescription: A dismissible tip with an optional action.
stories.docsDescription: Inline coaching surface with `heading`, `message`, optional `action-label`, and `open`.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-nudge heading="Try grid view" message="Preview files as thumbnails." action-label="Show me"></box-nudge>

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-nudge open heading="Try grid view" message="Preview files as thumbnails from the view switcher." action-label="Show me"></box-nudge>

variants.name: No action
variants.html: <box-nudge open heading="Tip" message="Use filters to narrow results."></box-nudge>

stories.title: Components/Feedback/Spinner
stories.shortDescription: An indeterminate loading indicator.
stories.docsDescription: A looping indicator for indeterminate waits. The `label` names it for assistive technology.

stories.title: Components/Feedback/Progress Bar
stories.shortDescription: A determinate progress indicator.
stories.docsDescription: A horizontal bar showing completion from 0–100 with an accessible label.

stories.title: Components/Feedback/Progress Ring
stories.shortDescription: A circular determinate progress indicator.
stories.docsDescription: Shows completion with `value` (and optional `max`) plus an accessible `label`.

stories.title: Components/Feedback/Progress Steps
stories.shortDescription: A stepped progress indicator.
stories.docsDescription: Pass steps as JSON `items` and the active `value`.

stories.title: Components/Feedback/Skeleton
stories.shortDescription: A placeholder block for loading layouts.
stories.docsDescription: Reserves space with `width` and `height` while content loads.

stories.title: Components/Feedback/Toast
stories.shortDescription: A transient status message.
stories.docsDescription: Shows a short `message` with an optional tone. Toggle visibility with `open`.

stories.title: Components/Forms/Switch
stories.shortDescription: A binary on/off toggle.
stories.docsDescription: A labelled toggle for an immediate boolean setting; emits `change` with the new state.

variants.name: With description
variants.html: <box-switch label="Shared links" description="Anyone with the link can view" checked></box-switch>

stories.title: Components/Forms/Checkbox
stories.shortDescription: A single selectable option.
stories.docsDescription: A labelled checkbox for an individual boolean choice; emits `change` when toggled.

stories.title: Components/Forms/Checkbox Group
stories.shortDescription: A labelled set of multi-select checkboxes.
stories.docsDescription: Form-associated checkbox group. `options` is JSON; `value` is a JSON array of selected values.

stories.title: Components/Forms/Radio Group
stories.shortDescription: A labelled set of mutually exclusive choices.
stories.docsDescription: Form-associated radio group. Provide choices as JSON `options` and the selected `value`.

stories.title: Components/Forms/Search Field
stories.shortDescription: A labelled search input with clear affordance.
stories.docsDescription: Form-associated search field for queries. Use `label` for the accessible name; clear resets the value.

referenceRows.name: change
referenceRows.description: Fired when the query is committed.

stories.title: Components/Forms/Text Field
stories.shortDescription: A single-line labelled text input.
stories.docsDescription: Form-associated text input with label, optional placeholder, and validation hooks (`invalid`, `error-message`).

referenceRows.name: change
referenceRows.description: Fired when the value is committed.

variants.name: Invalid
variants.html: <box-text-field label="Folder name" value="" invalid error-message="Name is required"></box-text-field>

stories.title: Components/Forms/Text Area
stories.shortDescription: A multi-line labelled text input.
stories.docsDescription: Form-associated textarea with `label`, optional `placeholder` / `rows`, and validation hooks.

variants.name: Filled
variants.html: <box-text-area label="Notes" rows="4" value="Looks good to merge."></box-text-area>

stories.title: Components/Forms/Number Input
stories.shortDescription: A labelled numeric field with optional bounds.
stories.docsDescription: Form-associated number entry. Use `min` / `max` / `value` with an accessible `label`.

variants.name: Disabled
variants.html: <box-number-input label="Page size" value="25" min="1" max="100" disabled></box-number-input>

stories.title: Components/Forms/Date Field
stories.shortDescription: A labelled date input.
stories.docsDescription: Form-associated date field. Pin demo values with `value` (and optional `min` / `max`).

stories.title: Components/Forms/Select
stories.shortDescription: A single-select dropdown field.
stories.docsDescription: Form-associated select. Provide choices as JSON `options` and the current `value`.

variants.name: Disabled
variants.html: <box-select label="Owner" options='[{"label":"Morgan Lee","value":"morgan"},{"label":"Alex Kim","value":"alex"}]' value="morgan" disabled></box-select>

stories.title: Components/Forms/Combobox
stories.shortDescription: A filterable single-select combobox.
stories.docsDescription: Form-associated combobox. Provide choices as JSON `options`.

stories.title: Components/Forms/Multi Select
stories.shortDescription: A multi-value select field.
stories.docsDescription: Form-associated multi-select. `options` is JSON; `value` is a JSON array of selected values.

stories.title: Components/Forms/Dropdown
stories.shortDescription: A labelled menu button for choosing one item.
stories.docsDescription: Provide entries as JSON `items` (`id`/`label`) and the selected `value` (item id).

stories.title: Components/Forms/Rating
stories.shortDescription: A star-style rating control.
stories.docsDescription: Form-associated rating with `value` out of `max` and an accessible `label`.

stories.title: Components/Forms/Slider
stories.shortDescription: A labelled range slider.
stories.docsDescription: Form-associated slider with `value` between `min` and `max`.

stories.title: Components/Forms/Spin Button
stories.shortDescription: A numeric stepper control.
stories.docsDescription: Form-associated spinbutton with `value` between optional `min` / `max`.

stories.title: Components/Forms/Calendar
stories.shortDescription: A standalone month calendar grid.
stories.docsDescription: Pin demos with `value`, `month`, and `today` ISO dates so rendering stays deterministic.

stories.title: Components/Forms/Category Selector
stories.shortDescription: A compact category filter control.
stories.docsDescription: Provide categories as JSON `options` and the selected `value`.

stories.title: Components/Forms/Dual Listbox
stories.shortDescription: A transfer list for choosing multiple options.
stories.docsDescription: Provide `options` and selected `value` as JSON arrays.

stories.title: Components/Forms/Range Slider
stories.shortDescription: A dual-thumb numeric range control.
stories.docsDescription: Set `start`/`end` within `min`/`max` for a bounded range.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-range-slider label="Size range" min="0" max="100" start="20" end="80"></box-range-slider>

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-range-slider label="Size range" min="0" max="100" start="20" end="80"></box-range-slider>

stories.title: Components/Forms/Tag Input
stories.shortDescription: A token field for labels and tags.
stories.docsDescription: Provide committed tags via the comma-separated `value` attribute.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-tag-input label="Labels" placeholder="Add a label" value="marketing, q3, launch"></box-tag-input>

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-tag-input label="Labels" placeholder="Add a label" value="marketing, q3, launch"></box-tag-input>

stories.title: Components/Forms/Time Field
stories.shortDescription: A time-of-day input.
stories.docsDescription: Use a 24-hour `value` string such as `09:30`.

stories.title: Components/Overlays/Dialog
stories.shortDescription: A modal dialog for confirmations and focused tasks.
stories.docsDescription: Toggle with `open`. Provide `heading` and optional `description` / `confirm-label` for the primary action.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-dialog open heading="Delete item?" description="This cannot be undone." confirm-label="Delete"></box-dialog>

variants.name: Open
variants.html: <box-dialog open heading="Delete item?" description="This cannot be undone." confirm-label="Delete"></box-dialog>

variants.name: Closed
variants.html: <box-dialog heading="Delete item?" description="This cannot be undone." confirm-label="Delete"></box-dialog>

stories.title: Components/Overlays/Drawer
stories.shortDescription: A side panel overlay for details and tasks.
stories.docsDescription: Toggle with `open`. Set `heading` and optional `description` / `position`.

variants.name: Open
variants.html: <box-drawer heading="Details" description="Item metadata and activity." open></box-drawer>

stories.title: Components/Overlays/Popover
stories.shortDescription: A small anchored overlay for extra info or actions.
stories.docsDescription: Toggle with `open`. `label` names the trigger; light-DOM children are the popover body.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-popover label="More info" placement="top" open>Shared links expire automatically.</box-popover>

variants.name: Open
variants.html: <box-popover label="More info" placement="top" open>Shared links expire automatically.</box-popover>

variants.name: Closed
variants.html: <box-popover label="More info" placement="top">Shared links expire automatically.</box-popover>

stories.title: Components/Overlays/Tooltip
stories.shortDescription: A short hover/focus hint for a control.
stories.docsDescription: Associates a concise `label` tip with a trigger. Use `open` to force visibility in demos.

referenceRows.name: trigger-label
referenceRows.description: Accessible name for the demo trigger.

variants.name: Open
variants.html: <box-tooltip label="Rename this item" open trigger-label="More actions"></box-tooltip>

stories.title: Components/Visuals/Illustration
stories.shortDescription: A registered empty/education illustration with optional copy.
stories.docsDescription: Resolves `asset` from the active design system (e.g. `empty-state-folder`). Pair with `heading` + `message` for empty states.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-illustration asset="empty-state-folder" heading="Nothing here yet" message="Upload a file to get started."></box-illustration>

variants.name: Empty folder
variants.html: <box-illustration asset="empty-state-folder" heading="Nothing here yet" message="Upload a file to get started."></box-illustration>

variants.name: Files information
variants.html: <box-illustration asset="files-information" heading="About these files" message="Details appear when you select an item."></box-illustration>

stories.title: Components/Identity/Avatar
stories.shortDescription: A compact person or entity mark.
stories.docsDescription: Shows initials from `name` (or explicit `initials`), optional `src` image, and size/tone variants.

stories.title: Components/Identity/Persona
stories.shortDescription: An avatar with name and supporting copy.
stories.docsDescription: Identity row for a person: `name` plus optional `description` / `subtitle` and avatar fields.

stories.title: Components/Identity/Contact Datalist Item
stories.shortDescription: A people-picker row with name and email.
stories.docsDescription: Show a contact candidate with optional selected state.

stories.title: Components/Collections/Card
stories.shortDescription: A content card with eyebrow and heading.
stories.docsDescription: Surfaces a titled block; put body copy in the light DOM.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-card eyebrow="PDF · 2.4 MB" heading="Quarterly Plan.pdf">Updated 2 hours ago.</box-card>

referenceRows.name: eyebrow
referenceRows.description: Small meta line above the heading.

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-card eyebrow="PDF · 2.4 MB" heading="Quarterly Plan.pdf">Updated 2 hours ago by Morgan Lee</box-card>

stories.title: Components/Collections/Carousel
stories.shortDescription: A horizontal featured-content carousel.
stories.docsDescription: Pass slides as JSON `items` (`id`/`title`/`description`).

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-carousel label="Featured" items='[{"id":"one","title":"Launch checklist","description":"Everything before go-live."},{"id":"two","title":"Brand refresh","description":"New tokens and iconography."},{"id":"three","title":"Q3 planning","description":"Roadmap and staffing."}]'></box-carousel>

stories.title: Components/Collections/Datalist Item
stories.shortDescription: A selectable row for picker lists.
stories.docsDescription: Show a labelled row with optional meta, icon, and selected state.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-datalist-item label="Quarterly Plan.pdf" meta="PDF · 2.1 MB" icon="P" value="123"></box-datalist-item>

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-datalist-item label="Quarterly Plan.pdf" meta="PDF · 2.1 MB" icon="P" value="123"></box-datalist-item>

variants.name: Selected
variants.html: <box-datalist-item label="Marketing" meta="Folder · 18 items" icon="M" value="42" selected></box-datalist-item>

stories.title: Components/Collections/Pagination
stories.shortDescription: Previous/next paging with a summary.
stories.docsDescription: Drive paging with `page`, `page-size`, and `total-items`.

stories.title: Components/Collections/Tree
stories.shortDescription: A hierarchical folder/tree navigator.
stories.docsDescription: Provide nested nodes as JSON `items` and the selected `value`.

stories.title: Components/Layout/Divider
stories.shortDescription: A horizontal or vertical rule, optionally labelled.
stories.docsDescription: Separates sections. Optional `label` annotates the rule; `orientation` switches axis.

stories.title: Components/Files/Drop Zone
stories.shortDescription: A drag-and-drop upload target.
stories.docsDescription: Invite files with a label and supporting message.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-drop-zone label="Upload files" message="Drag files here or browse."></box-drop-zone>

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-drop-zone label="Upload files" message="Drag files here or browse."></box-drop-zone>

stories.title: Components/Layout/Section
stories.shortDescription: A titled content section with optional actions.
stories.docsDescription: Use eyebrow/heading/description attributes and slots for actions and body content.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-section eyebrow="Workspace" heading="Members" description="People with access to this workspace."><box-persona name="Morgan Lee" description="Enterprise Admin"></box-persona></box-section>

variants.name: Default
variants.html:
<box-section eyebrow="Workspace" heading="Members" description="People with access to this workspace.">
  <box-button slot="actions" label="Invite" tone="primary"></box-button>
  <box-persona name="Morgan Lee" description="Enterprise Admin"></box-persona>
</box-section>

stories.title: Components/Navigation/Tabs
stories.shortDescription: A labelled tablist for switching views.
stories.docsDescription: Pass tab definitions as a JSON `options` attribute (`label`/`value`) and the selected `value`.

stories.title: Components/Navigation/Accordion
stories.shortDescription: An expandable section list.
stories.docsDescription: Pass panels as JSON `items` (`label`/`value`/`content`) and the open panel `value`.

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-accordion label="Details" items='[{"label":"Properties","value":"props","content":"Owner, size, and classification."},{"label":"Activity","value":"activity","content":"Recent comments and versions."}]' value="props"></box-accordion>

stories.title: Patterns/Share/Share Panel
stories.shortDescription: A share summary with link, collaborators, and settings.
stories.docsDescription: Compose heading/message with JSON `shared-link`, `collaborators`, `settings`, and `actions`.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-share-panel heading="Share Quarterly Plan.pdf" message="Anyone in the company with the link can view." shared-link='{"url":"https://box.com/s/example","access":"company","label":"Company link","status":"Active"}'></box-share-panel>

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-share-panel heading="Share Quarterly Plan.pdf" message="Anyone in the company with the link can view." shared-link='{"url":"https://box.com/s/example","access":"company","label":"Company link","status":"Active"}' collaborators='[{"name":"Morgan Lee","role":"Editor"},{"name":"Alex Kim","role":"Viewer"}]' settings='[{"label":"Downloads","value":"Allowed"},{"label":"Expiration","value":"Jun 1, 2026"}]' actions='[{"id":"copy","label":"Copy link"}]'></box-share-panel>

stories.title: Patterns/File Request/File Request Builder
stories.shortDescription: A builder for collecting files from external parties.
stories.docsDescription: Pass request `fields` and `settings` as JSON arrays.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-file-request-builder heading="Collect vendor W-9s" message="Request tax forms from onboarding vendors." fields='[{"id":"company","label":"Company name","required":true}]'></box-file-request-builder>

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-file-request-builder heading="Collect vendor W-9s" message="Request tax forms from onboarding vendors." fields='[{"id":"company","label":"Company name","required":true},{"id":"w9","label":"W-9 upload","description":"PDF only","required":true}]' settings='[{"id":"due","label":"Due date","description":"Jul 31, 2026"},{"id":"notify","label":"Email notifications","description":"On upload"}]'></box-file-request-builder>

stories.title: Patterns/Task/Review Queue Item
stories.shortDescription: A review-queue row with assignee and metrics.
stories.docsDescription: Combine heading/status attributes with JSON `assignee`, `metrics`, and `actions`.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-review-queue-item heading="MSA_Acme_v4.pdf" item-label="Contract" status="Awaiting review" priority="Medium" due-date="Jul 14, 2026"></box-review-queue-item>

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-review-queue-item heading="MSA_Acme_v4.pdf" item-label="Contract" status="Awaiting review" priority="Medium" due-date="Jul 14, 2026" message="Second-pass legal review." assignee='{"name":"Morgan Lee","role":"Legal"}' metrics='[{"label":"Pages","value":"34"},{"label":"Comments","value":"6"}]' actions='[{"id":"open","label":"Open"},{"id":"approve","label":"Approve","tone":"primary"}]'></box-review-queue-item>

stories.title: Patterns/Insights/Metric Card
stories.shortDescription: A KPI card with optional trend.
stories.docsDescription: Surface a headline metric; pass optional JSON `trend` for delta tone/label.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-metric-card heading="Active shared links" value="1,284" eyebrow="Last 30 days" status="Healthy" trend='{"label":"+16.5%","tone":"success"}'></box-metric-card>

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-metric-card heading="Active shared links" value="1,284" eyebrow="Last 30 days" message="Up from 1,102 in the prior period." status="Healthy" trend='{"label":"+16.5%","tone":"success"}'></box-metric-card>
